name: farmacia-new
description: Sistema de farmacia POS + administracion + analitica

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @farmacia/api && npm run build --workspace @farmacia/web && npm run build --workspace @farmacia/desktop
scripts.package:desktop: npm run build --workspace @farmacia/api && npm run build --workspace @farmacia/web && npm run dist --workspace @farmacia/desktop
scripts.package:desktop:signed: npm run build --workspace @farmacia/api && npm run build --workspace @farmacia/web && npm run dist:signed --workspace @farmacia/desktop
